case_title: POPE,JOHN VS DAILY PACIFIC BUILDER-A DIVISION/MCGRAW-HILL INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY POPE,JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT DAILY PACIFIC BUILDER-A DIVISION/MCGRAW-HILL INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POPE,JOHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DAILY PACIFIC BUILDER-A DIVISION/MCGRAW-HILL INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
